decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id corridor_utica-av which has the same source_id (2013_09_19_sbs_utica_cb17) and alias (corridor_utica-ave-st-johns-church-cb17) in the registry. The observation's own base_record_id is the correct canonical record; no link to a different record needed.
